name: OpenClaw Code Agent
description: Orchestrate coding agent sessions from OpenClaw

model.description: Override model for all Codex sessions (e.g. 'gpt-5.3-codex', 'gpt-5.4'). Falls back to agent model config if not set.

reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort for Codex sessions. 'high' for complex tasks, 'medium' (default) for balance, 'low' for speed.

defaultWorkdir.description: Default working directory for new sessions

idleTimeoutMinutes.description: Idle timeout in minutes for multi-turn sessions before auto-kill

sessionGcAgeMinutes.description: TTL in minutes before terminal runtime sessions are evicted from memory (persisted metadata remains resumable).

maxPersistedSessions.description: Maximum number of completed sessions to keep in memory for resume. In practice, the 24h GC TTL (`sessionGcAgeMinutes`) is the primary retention control.

permissionMode.description: Default plugin permission/orchestration mode for coding agent sessions

codexApprovalPolicy.description: Codex-only SDK/CLI approval policy. Defaults to 'on-request'. Set to 'never' to keep Codex from requesting approval for privileged actions. Distinct from plugin permissionMode / plan orchestration.

agentChannels.description: Map of agent working directories to notification channels

maxAutoResponds.description: Maximum consecutive auto-responds per session before requiring user input

planApproval.description: Plan approval behavior. 'delegate' (default): orchestrator autonomously decides whether to approve low-risk plans or escalate to the user. 'approve': orchestrator can auto-approve after verification. 'ask': orchestrator always forwards plans to the user for approval.

defaultHarness.description: Default agent harness when agent_launch omits the harness parameter.

fallbackChannel.label: Fallback notification channel
fallbackChannel.help: Default channel used when no workspace-specific agentChannels entry matches the session workdir.

agentChannels.label: Workspace notification channels
agentChannels.help: Map absolute working-directory paths to notification channels so each workspace routes session updates to the right chat.

defaultWorkdir.label: Default working directory
defaultWorkdir.help: Base directory used for new sessions when agent_launch does not provide a workdir.

defaultModel.label: Default model
defaultModel.help: Default model for new sessions when a harness-specific override is not set.

model.label: Codex model override
model.help: Override model for all Codex sessions; falls back to the agent model config or defaultModel when unset.

maxSessions.label: Maximum concurrent sessions
maxSessions.help: Upper limit on concurrently running coding-agent sessions.

idleTimeoutMinutes.label: Idle timeout (minutes)
idleTimeoutMinutes.help: Minutes a paused multi-turn session can remain idle before the plugin auto-kills it.

permissionMode.label: Default permission mode
permissionMode.help: Default plugin orchestration mode used when new coding-agent sessions are launched. This is separate from the Codex SDK approval policy.

codexApprovalPolicy.label: Codex approval policy
codexApprovalPolicy.help: Real Codex SDK/CLI approval policy for Codex sessions. Defaults to 'on-request'; use 'never' to preserve fully non-interactive Codex approval behavior.

planApproval.label: Plan approval policy
planApproval.help: Choose whether plans are auto-approved, always escalated, or delegated to the orchestrator.
